name: Block Asia-Pacific Region
description: Blocks traffic from Asia-Pacific countries that are common sources of automated attacks and spam. Includes China, Russia, North Korea, and other high-risk APAC nations. Use with caution if you have legitimate APAC users.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Block High-Risk APAC
rules.notes: Blocks China, Russia, North Korea, Vietnam, Indonesia, Philippines, Bangladesh, Pakistan, Myanmar, Cambodia, Laos.
